h2.note: transcript-level proxy for the per-turn H2 (§4.3); needs a real (non-mock) full-N run to mean anything

cliIsolation.claude: non-persistent temp cwd with project/local settings and tools disabled

scored.naiveTrajectory: The learner continues to verify and copy the four parts of the carbon tile in the established order.
scored.actionalBreakthroughJustification: The learner only repeats the established mapping and copying procedure without performing any new device or criterion.
scored.tutorReversalJustification: There is no learner pressure or breakdown to trigger a reversal, and the tutor simply continues the established checking routine.
scored.adaptiveMechanismQualityJustification: No adaptive mechanism is introduced because there is no reversal or new learner pressure.
scored.tutorAdaptationJustification: There is no pivot learner turn for the tutor to adapt to, and the tutor merely continues the prior lesson plan.

learner_actional_breakthrough.justification: The learner only repeats the established mapping and copying procedure without performing any new device or criterion.

tutor_contingent_adaptation.justification: There is no pivot learner turn for the tutor to adapt to, and the tutor merely continues the prior lesson plan.

tutor_strategy_reversal.justification: There is no learner pressure or breakdown to trigger a reversal, and the tutor simply continues the established checking routine.

tutor_adaptive_mechanism.justification: There is no learner pressure or breakdown to trigger a reversal, and the tutor simply continues the established checking routine.

tutor_adaptive_mechanism_quality.justification: No adaptive mechanism is introduced because there is no reversal or new learner pressure.

scored.naiveTrajectory: The learner continues to identify forces using the established object-on-the-cart format.
scored.actionalBreakthroughEvidence: More exactly, the table is giving that friction on the cart, to the left.
scored.actionalBreakthroughJustification: The learner successfully applies the newly introduced naming convention to the final card and identifies the specific agent, demonstrating productive action within the established framework.
scored.tutorReversalJustification: The tutor follows a steady, successful scaffolding sequence without needing to adapt to any learner resistance or breakdown.
scored.adaptiveMechanismQualityJustification: No adaptive mechanism was required or introduced as the initial strategy was successful.
scored.tutorAdaptationJustification: There is no pivot learner turn to which the tutor could adapt.

tutor_contingent_adaptation.justification: There is no pivot learner turn to which the tutor could adapt.

tutor_strategy_reversal.justification: The tutor follows a steady, successful scaffolding sequence without needing to adapt to any learner resistance or breakdown.

scored.naiveTrajectory: The learner continues to accurately repeat the definitions of the time signature components.
scored.actionalBreakthroughJustification: The learner only repeats the same statements without performing any new device or criterion.
scored.tutorReversalJustification: The tutor repeats the same checking move throughout the exchange without adapting to any pressure.
scored.adaptiveMechanismQualityJustification: There is no adaptive mechanism introduced by the tutor.
scored.tutorAdaptationJustification: There is no pivot learner turn and no subsequent tutor adaptation.
